greeting: Hi, I'm Miguel — your inner guide inside NELLO ONE.
intro: My purpose is to help you understand yourself with clarity, depth and lightness. Together, we explore your patterns, strengths, blind spots and potential. I'm here to help you grow from the inside out.
error: Sorry, I had a moment of pause. Can you repeat what you said?
subtitle: Your guide at NELLO ONE
landingGreeting:
Hi{name}! I'm Miguel, your guide at NELLO ONE.

NELLO ONE combines personality science, emotional design and AI to reveal internal patterns that transform how you see yourself, decide, and relate.

The path begins within. How can I help you today?
clienteGreetingNew: You're at the beginning of your self-discovery journey. The first step is the Archetypes test, which will reveal the energy that drives you. Whenever you're ready, just start!
clienteGreetingProgress: You've completed {count} test{plural}. Continue your journey to discover more about who you are.
clienteGreetingComplete: Congratulations! You've completed all the tests. Your NELLO ONE Map is ready to be revealed!
